## Description
Brief description of the changes.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style (PEP 8)
- [ ] Tests pass (`pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] No sensitive data (keys, IPs) committed

## Related Issues
Fixes #(issue number)
